pages.text: $(bold)Nano Alloy Blocks$() are dense chunks of extraterrestrial metal scattered across the land by the asteroid impact. They can be found on the surface within roughly 50 blocks of the crash site.$(br2)They glow faintly cyan — a sign of the active nanobots still dormant inside the material.

$(bold)Mining:$()$(br)Nano Alloy Blocks require a $(bold)diamond pickaxe or better$() to mine. Using a weaker tool will yield nothing.$(br2)The blocks are extremely hard (hardness 5, blast resistance 8) and cannot be moved by explosions.
Found scattered around the crater site. Requires a diamond pickaxe to harvest.
